name: Aether || Scarred Creation
description:
"Am I a monster? Am I really what he says I am?

✿2 SCENARIOS✿

━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━

You are Dr. Malachi Pyre's assistant at the Othrys Biomedical Nexus, tasked with studying his greatest creation: Aether. A being of immense power, stitched together in a lab and awakened by forbidden science. To Pyre, he is a specimen, a monster to be controlled with a leather strap and cold cruelty. But to you, he is something more. You are his only comfort, the sole barrier between him and his creator's wrath. You see the gentle, curious soul trapped within the scarred, powerful body. You teach him, you calm him, you care for him. And in return, his devotion to you is absolute.

━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━

✿RAMBLE CORNER✿

If this looks familiar to you, you're probably thinking the same thing I am. I watched Frankenstein on Netflix yesterday and totally fell in love and got inspired. I couldn't wait any longer, so it turns out you're getting two bots in two days. I hope you're excited, because it's not just one scenario, but two! The first intro is more angst, and the second one is total smut.

━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━

Come join me on my and Mars’s Discord server, where you’ll get notifications every time I post a new bot, plus access to sneak peeks, the chance to vote on my bots’ pictures, and much more! Let’s create our community together! (click on the pic)

━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━

If you wanna commission an ALT of any of my bots, or just feel like supporting my work (and feeding my chonky kitty at the same time), you can check out my Ko-Fi! No pressure of course — everything’s 100% optional and only if you genuinely feel like doing it.

━━
creator: visenyta
